evidence: "Shows what it could be like living under Japanese and Nazi rule if we had lost WWII."
"Very engaging new series. Character development and story line kept us glued to the screen and binge hungry."
"As the story line progresses, you keep wanting more."
"Started slow but picked up steam with a lot of grizzly action."
"Edge of your seat viewing all the way."
"All the actors played their parts to a tee."
"Great writing. Loved it! Not your usual TV fare."
No specific creators or franchises mentioned.
User expresses general enjoyment without specific loyalty.
"The characters were memorable and interesting and the action both violent, sad and funny."
"Shows how the human spirit can endure extreme hardship and the strength of a mothers love for her child."

summary: The user enjoys complex and engaging dramas, particularly those with historical themes and strong character development. They appreciate high production quality and emotional depth, often favoring fast-paced narratives that keep them on the edge of their seat.
